label: Fireline Garden
description: A PvZ-inspired lane defense where greedy energy plants can physically block your own shots, forcing forecast-based lane architecture.

label: Neon Bent Lanes
description: A lane-defense game where generators create energy but block friendly fire, and once per wave you can pay to bend an entire lane into an arc to rewrite enemy-path and projectile collisions.

label: Resonance Garden
description: A lane-defense circuit garden where allied shots can be intentionally blocked by generators, stored as overcharge, and released during lane bends to solve combo challenge waves.

label: Resonance Garden
description: A lane-defense game where you deliberately let generators intercept allied bullets to store power, then bend a lane once per wave to transform the next discharge into a stronger refracted attack.
